title: Sedum pseudomontanum
intro: Sedum pseudomontanum is a succulent plant species native to the mountainous regions of China, known for its medicinal properties and adaptogenic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system and reduce stress. Sedum pseudomontanum contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is typically used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its adaptogenic effects.

The classification of Sedum pseudomontanum is further divided into the order Saxifragales and the class Magnoliopsida.
